Footer.tagline: End-to-end relocation services — making your move to London easy and stress-free.
Footer.newsletterText: News and special offers — occasional and to the point.

Landing.heroSubtitle: Airport pickup, housing search, paperwork, banking, NHS — we take care of everything that usually takes weeks. You just arrive and start living.
Landing.packagesSubtitle: Pick the level of support that fits you — from airport pickup to full relocation.
Landing.servicesSubtitle: Just need one or two things? Take exactly what you need — no overpaying.

errors.packageExists: There's already a package in your cart. Please remove it before adding a new one.
errors.serviceExists: This service is already in your cart.

meet.name: “Meet Me” Package
includes: 🚌 Public transport paid and escort to your London address or train station
📱 SIM card (tariff paid by you on activation)
🎫 Oyster card (card included, top-ups paid by you)
meet.note: ⚠️ Service available within London. For other cities the price is calculated individually.

housing.name: “Housing” Package
includes: 🏠 Calling unlimited listings matching your criteria
housing.note: ⚠️ All services within London. For other cities the price is calculated individually.

premium.name: Premium Package
premium.note: ⚠️ All offline services within London. For other cities the price is calculated individually.

airportPublic.name: ✈️ Airport pickup + public transport
airportPublic.description: Pickup and escort to your London accommodation or train station. Public transport included. ⚠️ For other cities the price is calculated individually.

airportTaxi.name: ✈️ Airport pickup + private taxi transfer
airportTaxi.description: Pickup and escort to your London accommodation or train station. Taxi booked and paid by the company (included). ⚠️ For other cities the price is calculated individually.

sim.name: 📱 SIM card
sim.description: SIM card provided and activation help. Tariff paid by client. ⚠️ Service available in London. For other cities the price is calculated individually.

oyster.name: 🎫 Oyster card
oyster.description: Oyster card purchase for public transport. Card included, top-ups paid by client. ⚠️ Service available in London. For other cities the price is calculated individually.

housingSearch.name: 🔍 Housing search & shortlist
housingSearch.description: • Calling unlimited listings matching your criteria. • Final shortlist provided to client. • Each in-person viewing billed separately — £38 ($50). ⚠️ Viewings within London. For other cities the price is calculated individually.

tempHousing.name: 🏨 Temporary accommodation help
tempHousing.description: Picking and booking a hotel/hostel for the first days. Accommodation paid by client.

moving.name: 🚚 Moving logistics
moving.description: Help choosing and booking a moving company. Moving cost paid by client. ⚠️ Service within London. For other cities the price is calculated individually.

gp.name: 📝 Local GP (NHS) registration
gp.description: Personal escort for local GP registration. ⚠️ Service within London. For other cities the price is calculated individually.

support.name: 🕐 7-day support (9:00–17:00)
support.description: Support and consultations via Telegram and in person if needed. ⚠️ Service within London. For other cities the price is calculated individually.

neighborhood.name: 📊 Neighbourhood assessment
neighborhood.description: Site visit to your chosen area, photo/video report, infrastructure overview. ⚠️ Service within London. For other cities the price is calculated individually.

utilities.name: 💡 Utilities setup
utilities.description: Help connecting internet, gas and electricity. ⚠️ Service within London. For other cities the price is calculated individually.

bank.name: 🏦 Bank account opening (online banking)
bank.description: Support opening a digital account with online banking. ✅ Available online, in any city.

lease.name: 📜 Lease translation & signing help
lease.description: Lease translation and on-site signing support. ⚠️ Service within London. For other cities the price is calculated individually.

docs.name: 📄 Document translation
docs.description: Official document translation (can be done online).
